sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31423" key="ei)sku/klhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰσκύκλ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n31423.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the mechanism on which the</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἐκκύκλημα</quote_> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">turns,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:128" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.128</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
